name: unity-sharded-review
title: Unity Sharded Review
description: Review a broad Unity scope by shard, merge findings, adversarially verify claims, and report confirmed issues only.

scopePaths.description: Directories, assemblies, packages, or files to review.

reviewGoal.description: Bug, regression, compatibility, or architecture focus for the review.

phases.description: Split the review scope into independent read-only shards.

steps.description: Return shard ids, paths, and review focus.

phases.description: Review each shard read-only and emit evidence-backed findings.

steps.description: Inspect one shard without editing files and return Finding[].

phases.description: Merge duplicate findings by file, line, claim, and evidence.

steps.description: Return normalized Finding[] with duplicates removed.

phases.description: Verify each claim against concrete repository evidence.

steps.description: Return Verdict[] using confirmed, refuted, or uncertain.

phases.description: Report confirmed findings first and list evidence gaps separately.

steps.description: Generate a review report grounded in confirmed evidence.

artifacts.description: Confirmed findings and uncertain evidence gaps.
